kits.note: Page stamps data-name=component.co.product.in.this.order on Accordion root; Item keeps component.gse.accordion (Order Details UXDS frame 11920:238008).

Presentational panel (link groups grid + hero asset + promo band); parent mega-menu nav item owns hover open-state via `open` prop (Larkin frame 7650:86049 / integration frame 2539:593672). `module.mega.menu` (node 7650:86158) is the same file's wrapper adding the full-viewport separation scrim (`fills/mega menu flyout gradient` fill style, mix-blend-multiply) rendered by this same component as `[data-name="module.mega.menu.scrim"]`. Scrim click / Escape dismiss via `useOverlayEscapeDismiss.ts` (`onDismiss` prop).

Click-to-open full-viewport search takeover. `L & XL / Initial Suggestions` (node 2544:589387) — empty-query Quick Links state. `L & XL / Search Query Suggestions` (node 2544:589399) is unbuilt in Figma (only the browser-mock device frame, no content layer) — the non-empty-query grouped-results layout reuses the same field row + the one titled-link-group pattern already proven by MegaMenuFlyout, not invented chrome. `module.ss.couldnt.find.content.slot` (node 21362:294522) is the third "couldn't find" scenario — `notFound` prop: spelling-correction offer + Category/Content Suggestions + a product-suggestion grid + "View all results" CTA; Boots' `fullScreenSearchMount.tsx` curates every field from real PLP catalog + footer data (typo-tolerant match via a confidence-floored edit-distance check, never a wild guess) and renders product tiles with no photography — the real PLP catalog has none, so that's an intentional under-match, not a gap. Shares `UxdsTextLink.tsx` (link renderer) and `useOverlayEscapeDismiss.ts` (Escape/scrim-click dismiss) with MegaMenuFlyout.
Engine-native motion primitive — no Figma source node. Glyph-swap arc spinner for optimistic pending states (wishlist/save/add-to-cart).
Engine-native motion primitive — no Figma source node. `framer-motion` scale pulse celebrating a pending action's real commit landing.
